name: Ham Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out the pastry thinly and cut rectangles measuring 3 x 6 inches (7 x 14 cm).
2. Brush the edges of each rectangle with egg white.
3. FOR THE FILLING: Cut ham and pickled gherkins into strips that are 3 inches (7 cm) long.
4. Place a few strips of ham and gherkins on each pastry piece.
5. Roll up each pastry from the shorter side.
6. Arrange the rolls on a greased baking sheet.
7. Brush with milk.
8. OVEN: Preheat for 5 minutes at very hot, then bake at very hot for about 15 minutes.
